[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [Textmodifier](../../Textmodifier.md) / sqrt

# Method: sqrt()

```ts
sqrt(value): number;
```

Calculate the square root of a number.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `value` | `number` | Value to square root. |

## Returns

`number`

Square root of the value.
